title: Beautiful Arrangement
hints: Focus on filling positions one by one. At each step, check if the chosen number satisfies the divisibility rule for that specific position.
Use backtracking with a bitmask to track which numbers from 1 to N have already been used in the current permutation.
Since N is small (up to 15), the bitmask allows you to efficiently explore all valid assignments without recomputing for identical sets of used numbers.
